scripts.bundle: npm run build && cd .. && zip -r brendonbaughcom.zip brendonbaughcom -x 'brendonbaughcom/node_modules/*' -x 'brendonbaughcom/src/*' -x 'brendonbaughcom/.git/*' -x 'brendonbaughcom/package-lock.json' -x 'brendonbaughcom/docker-compose.yaml' -x 'brendonbaughcom/phpcs.xml.dist' -x 'brendonbaughcom/composer.json' -x 'brendonbaughcom/.DS_Store' && echo 'Bundle ready: ../brendonbaughcom.zip'
